channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Graffiti, 28th March
item.description:
Rose Pharmacy. Remove graffiti from shutter

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Creek Road, Deptford
Report on FixMyStreet

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Creek Road, Deptford

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Creek Road, Deptford

item.title: Graffiti, 28th March
item.description:
Margaret McMilliam Halls of residence. Remove graffiti from wall to block H near Sainsburys

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Creek Road, Deptford
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lime bikes, 28th March
item.description:
The lime bikes are constantly dumped here, at some point i have counted more than 20 bikes, as soon as they are cleared they begin building up again, this happens on a daily basis it is right by a play park and it obstructs a public footpath. SOMETHING HAS TO BE DONE TO PERMANENTLY PREVENT THIS HAPPENING

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Welland Street, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flypostering, 28th March
item.description:
Creek Riad Remove flypostering from Lamppost CR001

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Creek Road, Deptford
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bunch of rubbish dumped in corner by fence, 28th March
item.description:
This rubbish has been there for the past week or so

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Camelot Close, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sandy Hill Road SE18, 28th March
item.description:
Blocked street gullies outside numbers 11 and 30 Sandy hill Road

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Sandy Hill Road, Woolwich

item.title: Flypostering, 28th March
item.description:
McMilliam Street by Communal Allotment. Please clear flypostering from post

item.title: In front of the building of Brook wood House, 28th March
item.description:
Fly tipping in front of the Brook Wood house

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 172, Queen's Road, Nunhead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dangerous tree, 28th March
item.description:
A very tall tree at number 86 Petersham Drive the roots are travelling under the houses and raising the door steps, the branches are blocking view and blocking satellite signals
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 91, Petersham Drive, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fridge, 28th March
item.description:
Upstairs has fly-tipped fridge on pavement. Was marked as resolved. It is not, it is STILL there!
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Picardy Road, Lower Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street lighting in this lamp-post seems being shaded and does not function proper & sufficent lighting to the road and pavement underneath., 28th March
item.description:
The light bulb in the lamp-post adjoining House No. 8 Lavender Close, Bromley, BR2 9TG seems to have partly-shaded and does not provide sufficient and proper lighting for the road and pavement underneath. should be grateful if the shading element under the light bulb can be removed or light bulb replaced as appropriate. Thank you.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lavender Close, Southborough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Untaxed vehicle occupying private space in garage, 28th March
item.description:
Vehicle check indicates it is untaxed since Aug 2025, a new V5C logbook was issued recently on 12 Mar 2026, suspected vehicle was stolen and abandoned.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Warman Walk, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Offensive graffiti on side wall to 102 Millmark Grove, SE14 6RH, 28th March
item.description:
This graffiti has been here for over a month.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Millmark Grove, New Cross, Greater London

item.title: Flytipping of large, 28th March

Boxes, black bags and furniture

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bermondsey, Greater London

item.title: Parked in bay for past 2 weeks., 28th March
item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 129, Burnt Ash Lane, Sundridge, Greater London

item.title: Green wheelie bin fly-tipped, 28th March
item.description:
Could you remove the green wheelie bin that's been left here for the last few months please? The oh so lovely little darlings around here keep playing with it. Thank you.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Harvill Road, North Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Car without Reg plates parked for last 3 weeks, 28th March
item.description:
This car has been parked here for the last 3 weeks without reg plates.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Wricklemarsh Road, Kidbrooke
Report on FixMyStreet
